TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Jean-Claude Juncker Jean-Claude Juncker (ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1954 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' kawas na 1995 - kawas na 2013 hya' ga Jean-Claude Juncker, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1995 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jean-Claude Juncker minkahul sa Redange na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1954 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' List of prime ministers of Luxembourg canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: *ean- ¶~ ®lau*e *un ¶~ ®ker *ean- ¶~ ®lau*e *un ¶~ ®ker (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw luxemő≤our…£ ta Ē kawas~…ē na **** - kawas~…ē na **** ńßja Ē …£a *ean- ¶~ ®lau*e *un ¶~ ®ker, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral *ean- ¶~ ®lau*e *un ¶~ ®ker minkańßul s~…ēa re*aŇče na *apan. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēt o* prime minis~…ēters~…ē o* luxemő≤our…£ ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Jean-Claude Juncker Jean-Claude Juncker (ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1954 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' kawas na 1995 - kawas na 2013 hya' ga Jean-Claude Juncker, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1995 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jean-Claude Juncker minkahul sa Redange na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1954 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' List of prime ministers of Luxembourg canpyuta hknyun
